zh.Berry Pomeroy, Devonshire, England, UK: 英國英格蘭戴文貝里 波梅洛易
zh.Berry Pomeroy, Devon, England: 英國戴文貝里 波梅洛易
zh.Newton Abbot, Devon, England: 英國戴文牛頓 阿博特
zh.lifeSummary: 當Henry de Pomeroy於大約1220年出生在英國戴文貝里 波梅洛易時，他的父親Henry De Pomeraye10歲，母親Margeria de Vernon32歲。他於1277年與Isolda Pyn在英國英格蘭戴文貝里 波梅洛易結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1281年7月12日在英國戴文牛頓 阿博特享年62歲，埋葬在英國戴文易爾辛頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Henry de Pomeroy于大约1220年出生在英国戴文貝里 波梅洛易时，他的父亲Henry De Pomeraye10岁，母亲Margeria de Vernon32岁。他于1277年与Isolda Pyn在英国英格兰戴文貝里 波梅洛易结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1281年7月12日在英国戴文牛頓 阿博特享年62岁，埋葬在英国戴文易爾辛頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Pomeroy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (of Norman origin; mainly Devon and Dorset): habitational name from any of various places in northeastern France named with Old French pommeroie, pommeraie ‘apple orchard’ (collective of pomme ‘apple’). The name was established in Ireland in 1573.

nameMeanings.name: Henry
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: A perennially popular given name, of Continental Germanic origin, from haim ‘home’ + rīc ‘power, ruler’. It was an Old French name, adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain. It has been borne by eight kings of England. Not until the 17th century did the form Henry (as opposed to Harry ) become the standard vernacular form, mainly under the influence of the Latin form Henricus and French Henri.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Henry de Pomeroy was born about 1220, in Berry Pomeroy, Devon, England, his father, Henry De Pomeraye, was 10 and his mother, Margeria de Vernon, was 32. He married Isolda Pyn in 1277, in Berry Pomeroy, Devon, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 2 daughters. He died on 12 July 1281, in Newton Abbot, Devon, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in Ilsington, Devon, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Henry de Pomeroy est né environ 1220, à Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Angleterre, son père, Henry De Pomeraye, avait 10 ans et sa mère, Margeria de Vernon, avait 32 ans. Il a épousé Isolda Pyn en 1277, à Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé le 12 juillet 1281, à Newton Abbot, Devon, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Ilsington, Devon, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Henry de Pomeroy um 1220 in Berry Pomeroy, Devon, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry De Pomeraye 10 und seine Mutter Margeria de Vernon 32. Er hat 1277 in Berry Pomeroy, Devon, England, United Kingdom Isolda Pyn geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 12. Juli 1281 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Newton Abbot, Devon, England und wurde in Ilsington, Devon, England begraben.

Lui sposato Isolda Pyn nel 1277, nel Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 2 figlie. Morì il 12 luglio 1281, nel Newton Abbot, Devon, England, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Ilsington, Devon, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Henry de Pomeroyが約1220年にイギリスデボンバーリー ポメロイで生まれた時，父Henry De Pomerayeは10歳，母Margeria de Vernonは32歳であった。1277年にイギリスイギリスデボンバーリー ポメロイでIsolda Pynと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1281年7月12日にイギリスデボンニュートン アボットで62歳で死去し，イギリスデボンイルシントンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Henry de Pomeroy(이)가 대략 1220년 영국 데폰 베리 폼로이에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry De Pomeraye(은)는 10세였고, 그의 어머니 Margeria de Vernon(은)는 32세였다. 그는 1277년 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 베리 폼로이에서 Isolda Pyn(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1281년 7월 12일 영국 데폰 뉴턴 애벗에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 데폰 이징턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Henry de Pomeroy nasceu aproximadamente 1220, em Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Henry De Pomeraye, tinha 10 anos e sua mãe, Margeria de Vernon, tinha 32 anos. Ele casou-se com Isolda Pyn em 1277, em Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 12 de julho de 1281, em Newton Abbot, Devon, Inglaterra, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Ilsington, Devon, Inglaterra.

ro.Berry Pomeroy, Devonshire, England, UK: Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Henry de Pomeroy родился около 1220 г. в местности бирри помирои, девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Henry De Pomeraye было 10 лет, а матери, которую звали Margeria de Vernon, 32. Он женился на женщине по имени Isolda Pyn в 1277 г. в местности бирри помирои, девон, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 2 дочери. Он умер 12 июля 1281 г. в местности нютон эббот, девон, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности илсингтон, девон, Англия.

Se casó con Isolda Pyn en 1277, en Berry Pomeroy, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió el 12 de julio de 1281, en Newton Abbot, Devon, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Ilsington, Devon, Inglaterra.
